items.question: How long does setup take?
items.answer: Most teams are up and running in under 15 minutes. Connect your repo, configure your pipeline, and start shipping.

items.question: Can I use this with my existing tools?
items.answer: Yes. We integrate with GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket, and most CI/CD platforms. Your existing workflow stays intact.

items.question: Is there a free tier?
items.answer: The Starter plan is free forever. No credit card required. Upgrade when you need more capacity.

items.question: What happens to my data?
items.answer: Your code never leaves your infrastructure. We analyze metadata only. Full SOC 2 compliance and regular security audits.

items.question: Can I cancel anytime?
items.answer: Yes. No long-term contracts. Cancel anytime and export all your data with one click.
